Read All Reviews of Jesu submit a review Jesu Personal Masseur Interview Personal Interviews give you the opportunity to know the Masseur you are considering to hire better before you make the first step. Our Personal Masseur Interviews are a great way to give a little bit of personal and even intimate information about your massage experience. Get to know him better before you call! 1 Why did you become a Masseur? - I became a Masseur because I believe the body remembers what the mind forgets. Through touch, we awaken something ancient — a language beyond words. For me, massage is not just a technique, it’s a way to hold space for healing, presence, and quiet transformation. 2 Tell us a little about yourself, if you were to pick something what would you like your clients to absolutely know about you? - If there’s one thing I’d love my clients to know about me, it’s that I truly see the body as sacred. Every session is not just about releasing tension — it’s about honoring the story your body holds, and holding space for it to feel safe, loved, and free again. 3 How would you like someone that contacts you for a massage to feel when they leave? - I’d love for them to leave feeling seen, softened, and more at home in their body. That something inside them remembers — not just the massage, but the care, the presence, the permission to fully be. Read all 13 Answers Favorites You can add Jesu to your Favorites . Reviewed by Joboxerny on Jun 25 The headline for this review should be CALIENTE COLOMBIANS. I have had several massages with Christian Restrepo from this site. When I heard that he does 4 hand massages with his partner James I jumped at the chance to jump on James' massage table. James hosts at his beautiful modern apartment in Harlem a few blocks from the subway. As soon as I entered I was greeted by his masculine warmth, calm music and the delicious smell of a spicy incense. That set the mood for a wonderful massage session. James and Chris proceeded to work their magic on me with unscented oils and their strong yet affectionate strokes. I couldn't tell who was where and doing what, but I got lost in the ****** sensations coursing through my body. These guys worked every inch of me and were open to full reciprocation.  I have no doubt that booking James alone would also be an amazing treat. Needless to say I ended up needing a long shower in James' well appointed bathroom afterwards. We all hugged and kissed goodbye and I am already planning my next session with this amazing couple. Their rate for the services provided is very reasonable. Reviewed by WestEndAve on Jun 02 Not only is James warm, friendly and hosting in an inviting  atmosphere with a pristine bathroom, he does an outstanding job of relaxing your body. He’s good in every way he can be. Reviewed by Joharvard on May 09 Booking with James was super easy, and I really appreciated that he was able to fit me in same day. He was very welcoming, and his workspace was calm, clean, and inviting from the moment I arrived. Before starting, James took the time to ask about pressure, oils, and any areas I wanted him to focus on, which I really appreciated. Once the massage started, I completely melted in his hands — every movement felt soothing, intentional, and deeply relaxing. What really stood out was how connected and tailored the experience felt. James paid close attention to how my body responded and adjusted naturally throughout the session, making it feel incredibly personalized and intuitive. There was a real sense of trust and connection that made the massage even better. He also checked in throughout the session to make sure I was comfortable and that the pressure was right, and you could tell he genuinely takes his time instead of rushing through a routine. This was easily one of the best massages I’ve had on this platform. I only booked 60 minutes, but I’ll definitely be booking a longer session next time. And yes — he’s just as attractive in person as he is in his photos. Super sweet, professional, and highly recommended. I take my time to understand your body, your energy, and what you need in that moment. Every movement is intentional, every touch controlled — designed to help you fully disconnect and let go. Some sessions are about relaxation. Others… go deeper into sensation and connection. Discreet. Professional. Intuitive. If you know, you know. Mr. Em communicated very well with me; he was direct but flexible and didn't mind my questions.  I hosted him at my home because he seemed very genuine and down to earth.  Because he was traveling he had no massage table but he guaranteed he would give full attention to all my muscles and he asked if there were any areas to avoid or to give extra attention. I asked for extra attention to the glutes do to me having a desk job and he agreed while heartedly and even said he would give extra attention to my lower back.  Mr. Em played music from his phone for the session.  He had a very attractive body and encouraged mutual touch.  He used his entire body to promote long strokes and continued body contact throughout session.  I felt so pampered and delighted that I booked with him.  Mr. Em looks tough but he is a teddy bear who is very yummy 😋 like gummy bears.  I can't wait for our next session. I've taken every measure to ensure a relaxing and healing vibe- soft music, candles, heated massage oil, heated table with crisp linens. I offer showers before or after the massage.

I love what I do and continue to study different modalities and attend massage workshops. My goal is to make you feel completely stress free and relaxed.

4 hand tandem massage available upon request.

We had discussed by text the details of what I enjoy in a session, but I was very pleased how well he remembered specific requests that I had made, and his follow through was exceptional. Reviewed by bacchusboston on Jun 22 Onyx is fantastic, five stars without hesitation. The initial chat with him upon arrival made me realise that this is a sweet man and serious professional masseur. His strong hands 🙌🏼 led me to a state of bliss 💆‍♂️ and you will be very fortunate if you can catch him when his schedule allows. Looking forward to the next seasion already. Reviewed by Darkheart on Jun 10 I had an absolutely wonderful experience with Onyx. His technique was exceptional—skilled, intuitive, and perfectly tailored to what my body needed. From the moment I arrived, he created an atmosphere that felt more like a luxury spa retreat than a standard massage appointment. I especially appreciated the thoughtful details that elevated the entire experience. The music was beautifully chosen and created a calming, immersive environment that helped me fully relax. I also enjoyed his incorporation of crystals, which added a unique and soothing element to the session. Every aspect of the experience reflected care, intention, and attention to detail. Beyond his talent as a therapist, Onyx is warm, compassionate, and genuinely caring. He has a natural ability to make you feel comfortable, valued, and completely at ease. He is a beautiful man, both in appearance and in the positive energy he brings to his work. I truly enjoyed spending time with him and left feeling relaxed, refreshed, and uplifted. I highly recommend Onyx to anyone seeking an exceptional massage experience that combines expert technique, genuine care, and the thoughtful touches of a high-end spa! When we met for the appointment, he was very warm and considerate. As a masseur, he has a wonderful energy. The space was clean and welcoming, and the massage was incredible. I left feeling relaxed and energetically light. Highly recommend. Read All Reviews of Onyxforu submit a review Onyxforu Personal Masseur Interview Personal Interviews give you the opportunity to know the Masseur you are considering to hire better before you make the first step. Our Personal Masseur Interviews are a great way to give a little bit of personal and even intimate information about your massage experience. Get to know him better before you call! 1 How long have you been a Masseur and how long do think you'd like to continue? - I started back in July 2018, it’s now August 2024 so it’s been 6 years going on 7. I know at some point once my DJaying career takes off and I start for reach the superstar status it would be much harder to work as much as I am now. I am actually working on the beginning phases of my retirement plan. In about three years max I will have retired from full time work to focus on the next stages in my D’jay path going to producing school. But no need to worry I won’t leave you guys high and dry. I’ll still do some work when I can, and I’m working on passing all of my skills and knowledge on to the younger generation after me so you guys can still enjoy my legacy I’ve been providing almost a decade and have some interesting plans that incorporate this industry to help improve the quality and standards for all 🤫 2 Tell us a little about yourself, if you were to pick something what would you like your clients to absolutely know about you? - Most of my guest find out a lot about me through our sessions. The most common question is where am I from and what’s my story? It’s a mouthful, I was actually born in an unknown city in a hospital in Texas, while on my parents way to Ben Harbor Michigan where my mother was  from, at the age of 1 she married my stepfather  who was enlisting into the Navy. We immediately began moving every two years all around the country until I started attending middle school in Pensacola fl. I became a track star and prodigy in high school becoming third fastest in Florida in 2002. I attended Florida A & M University under a track scholarship, There I dulled enrolled my senior year at Taylor Technical University becoming an EMT. After graduating my bachelors in 2013 I moved to Atlanta for two years working in ICU at Piedmont hospital, then later on to work in 911 American Medical Response Emergency. In July 2015 I moved to Los Angeles, Due to the horrible pay in the prehospital emergency medical field I had to leave the field and begin bartending. After 5 years of bartending LAX airport Barnies Beanery I began massaging, now I’m up and coming Circuit tribal DJ, moving back from Medlline Colombia 3 How do you like clients to feel about the experience when they leave? - Absolutely without a doubt I want you guys to leave happy. I want you to feel my experience was completely worth it and that you can’t wait to come see me again. I want you to feel you established a bond with me so every time you come back it feels like your going to see a friend, I want you to leave feeling refreshed renewed, and ready to tackle the world so much that you still feel the effects of my energy and my work with you for the next few days if not weeks. I want to leaving you with a lasting impression that this is what you deserve as a gay or bisexual man (sorry ladies I’m only for the guys😅) Read all 13 Answers Favorites You can add Onyxforu to your Favorites . Reviewed by TravellerUSA on Sep 20, 2025 It's always a challenge to write a review when it has all pretty much been said before and you totally agree with it. I have been on this site a number of years, and Diego is definitely in my top two best experiences! - I cannot recommend him enough. He is the total package.....looks, professionalism, talent and personality. - He is very generous with his talents and time,  and also very engaging and interesting to talk to. - Three things that I don't think were mentioned in previous reviews... 1. He looks far younger than his profile says. His body is "Michaelangelo sculpture" perfect. 2. Despite his "edgy" look he is so sweet, considerate and caring. 3. We had a cuddle at the end, which ended the perfect session perfectly!.... Like a bow on a gift of great experiences! Reviewed by DancerStud on Aug 06, 2025 Diego was fantastic. He was on time, great conversation, & easy on the eyes. During the massage he checked in each moment. Truly Gift hands. Reviewed by Kevibot on Jun 23, 2025 Just book him. Experience this wonderful man for yourself. The reviews do not lie. Exudes love. Makes you feel like you're the only person that matters. Don't hesitate just do it. Read All Reviews of Alex_muscles submit a review Alex_muscles Personal Masseur Interview Personal Interviews give you the opportunity to know the Masseur you are considering to hire better before you make the first step. Our Personal Masseur Interviews are a great way to give a little bit of personal and even intimate information about your massage experience. Get to know him better before you call! 1 How long have you been a Masseur and how long do think you'd like to continue? - I’ve been practicing massage for almost 9 years in New York. How long more - only God knows for sure)) 
What I can say, that I have A LOT of regular clients who I will keep seeing after I stop advertising. That’s for sure) 2 What are your hobbies, what do you like to do in your spare time? - I am passionate about fitness - bodybuilding, mma and cycling are a part of my life forever)
Also I love traveling and cars. I am having a new car in a year or two (depending on how I love it)
That’s an addiction)) I love nice cars 3 Tell us a little about yourself, if you were to pick something what would you like your clients to absolutely know about you? - It is hard to find the right masseur, especially when all the guys on here are good looking!
But what I can say for sure, that I give my 101% of attention to every single person and I really work hard to deliver the best possible service, that’s why I am so successful in this industry. Also my personality plays a big role - I love to make jokes, I am sarcastic 😆, very intelligent, intellectual and easy to talk to so we always have a great time with my clients, that’s for sure) Read all 13 Answers Alex_muscles 's Blog ‼️10 years of practice and expertise‼️ Sep 21, 2025 I’m celebrating 10 years of massaging! With six years of experience as a licensed massage therapist, I know exactly how to guide you into that perfect state of deep relaxation and bliss. I specialize in deep tissue, Thai, neuromuscular, and sensual massage—seamlessly blending firm, therapeutic pressure with slow, tantalizing strokes that tease and entice. My touch is intuitive, knowing when to soothe, when to ignite, and when to leave you breathless with anticipation. Every session is an exploration of sensation, designed to unravel stress and heighten pleasure. But true indulgence isn’t just physical—it’s about connection. I don’t just work with my hands; I read energy, emotions, and unspoken desires. I know how to make you feel seen, understood, and completely at ease in my presence. The way you feel under my touch, the way your body responds, the way time seems to stand still—it’s all part of the experience. Let yourself be taken care of. Let go. Breathe me in. Because when you’re in my hands, the only thing that matters is how good you feel. Read All Reviews of KevinDevin submit a review KevinDevin Personal Masseur Interview Personal Interviews give you the opportunity to know the Masseur you are considering to hire better before you make the first step. Our Personal Masseur Interviews are a great way to give a little bit of personal and even intimate information about your massage experience. Get to know him better before you call! 1 How long have you been a Masseur and how long do think you'd like to continue? - I’ve been a masseur for around 4 years. However from a very young age I’ve been giving amateur massages to my friends and family for as long as I can remember. I consider touch and acts of service as my love languages. It’s an incredibly important part of my life and hope to continue to have some sort of massage practice for as long as my body allows me. :) 2 How do you like clients to feel about the experience when they leave? - My favorite thing about massage therapy is helping the client reach a deep state of relaxation. Stress is the leading cause of all sorts of health problems so creating a space where we can transmute that stress into relaxation and deep relief through massage and bodywork. I want the person leaving the massage feeling lighter and more care free then they did before the massage. 3 Do you remember your first client ? Tell us something about that first day when you decided to be a Masseur! - I do remember my first client I even remember the date! I was nervous at first because my client  was a 83 year old man. He had certain pathologies that made the massage an interesting and enjoyable challenge. At the end of the session the client was incredibly happy with his experience and loved how communicative I was during the massage. He mentioned that he hadn’t felt that much relief in ages. It made me realize how important touch is to anyone regardless of age and that’s stuck with me through out my practice Read all 5 Answers Favorites You can add KevinDevin to your Favorites . The experience starts with you taking off all of your clothes and lying down on my massage table. I will focus on the areas where you feel the most tension and provide relief. After you feel relaxed, we can devote the remaining time to a beautiful experience focused solely on your needs. We can do it at my private apartment in Hudson Yards or your place. I genuinely love giving massages, healing, and elevating my friends to a state of nirvana and ecstasy. It gives me great joy to help others feel completely relaxed, relieved from stress and tension, and leave very happy. I provide medium, deep, and extra-deep tissue massages without the pain often associated with deep tissue massages. I take my time to patiently find and treat every tense muscle. The cost is $180 for 60 minutes or $260 for 90 minutes. $100 extra for outcalls, provided it’s in the area. Gratuity is greatly appreciated, especially if it extends beyond the therapeutic experience. The best way to reach me is by [PHONE] text message. Most clients book days and weeks in advance. It is highly recommended. I encourage you to read my reviews to understand why. Cleanliness: I use Blueair Technology to maintain pristine air quality inside my apartment and a non-toxic sanitation and protection system on all my equipment and throughout the space after every session. I’m fully vaccinated against Covid (with booster shots). I got the 1st & 2nd doses of the MONKEYPOX vaccine. I frequently get thoroughly tested and keep myself very clean throughout the day. I guarantee high standards of cleanliness (reciprocation expected!). As always, referrals are the BEST compliment I can get. Reviewed by marcjr on Jun 22 Second to none is exactly how best blessings (Alex) can be described in the simplest yet truest way! After seeing him for almost 6 years, he has truly grown and developed his technique that turns a massage into an amazing experience. His bright smile and warm embrace always puts me at total easy and then he speaks with his hands. So gentle yet deep when needed, it is definitely not something taught but developed through experience! He is also the kindest and gentle soul that’s very caring and his amazing body wow also great hygiene and a very calming aura that’s perfect for the perfect massage. A beautiful view from his apartment with natural light is perfect setting. I don’t see him as my masseur any longer but as a great friend. A man full of wisdom yet of very little words. Thank you Alex for an excellent experience yet again and I look forward to seeing you soon. Again he is 2nd to NONE! Reviewed by TyrusThunder on May 05 Awesome session today with Alex!  Making arrangements is simple; his place is impeccable with amazing light and a killer view.  What sets him apart, other than what’s obvious in the photos, is his combination of skill and sensitivity—we began with Shiatsu on the floor and then moved to the heated massage table, and throughout he held an intuitive vibe and connection. Calm, bright, caring, unhurried, and focused on releasing every tense muscle—five stars in every way. Reviewed by PDWWDP on Mar 11 I have been Alexander’s client for almost three years and he keeps getting better with time. Speaking of time, that’s exactly what he delivers, the full amount of time that you book. Some masseurs start the clock ticking as soon as you walk in the door, Alexander doesn’t start the session until you climb onto the massage table, setting the stage for a relaxing and wonderful experience. The massage starts on a heated massage table using warm lotion located in the center of his spacious living room drenched with natural light. Back to the massage, I have never met a man more intuitive about navigating the male body then Alexander. He uses his entire body to relax yours and he knows what hidden magic buttons to press along the way. He leads you through a beautiful experience elevating you to a state of euphoria that words cannot further describe. Once again, thank you Alexander! I'm Matt, based in NYC, but I travel around from time to time (you can see my travel schedule on my profile). The massage experience provides a relaxing journey where all the stress held in your body and mind can be let go. Exclusively for gay, bi, and straight men. This is a blissful experience that you won't want to miss! During the session, scented candles and relaxing chill music are provided in a clean, cozy atmosphere. A mixture of Swedish, medium to deep-tissue, and sports massage techniques are used in this massage. In order to better reduce muscle pain, soreness, increase flexibility and range of motion, the massage is performed on a massage table covered with disposable sheets. The best time for me to work is during the daytime in my studio. Depending on the type of massage provided, the rate will vary. Please contact me by text for more details, and ask for the list of different massages. PS: if you are using a foreign number, message here on the website, and ill provide a whats app N. It will be a pleasure to see you. Cacao To Connect & Release: (75 minute) (NOT available if visiting your city) I will prepare organic ceremonial cacao which is used to bring about sensations of satisfaction & embodiment. We will begin by setting your intention, breathing together, enjoying the cacao & present moment. This will then lead into a 45 minute massage session. Reiki: (30 minute) - $100 An ancient form of energy healing originating from India (reintroduced in Japan), it works to remove energetic stagnation and blockages through a series of hand-placements across the body. This often results in emotional release, feeling "lighter", and an overall enhanced state of well being. When contacting, please communicate the: -Type of Session -Requested Slot Time *If I am visiting your city, I DO NOT travel with a table* *Out-call sessions require Prepaid deposit of $50 to pay for my transport* (Alternatively you can order my uber/lyft) *I have many clients who come back. When he moved down to my legs, he applied a cold pack on my injury, and afterward sprayed the affected area with some pain reliever. And the rest of the massage was attentive, sensual, and satisfying. Great location, great view, great table, great communication. Highly recommended.
